title: Majestica
description: Majestica is a fantasy medieval based texture pack that mixes realistic and cartoon-ish textures unique style!
body:
# Majestica
is a texture pack created 2015 as hobby project that was growing along side with my pixel art skill.
As of now it has perfect mixture of realistic and cartoon-ish textures that differentiate it from other packs.
It also adds new 3D models for items and foliage to bring new life and feeling to the game like no other pack does.

![showcase of features](https://i.ibb.co/4R3GF6P/majestica1.png)

Pack is frequently updated and I'm open to all feedback might have.
for any questions or feedback please join our discord

[![discord](https://i.ibb.co/W0NNg6K/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/GmKrkXAY83)
